description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and defines a single job named pages in the deploy stage. The pages job runs only on the master branch, caches the node_modules/ directory, executes npm install then npm run build, removes any existing public folder, moves the dist folder to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Ensure the artifact path is set to public and the job is assigned to the deploy stage.
